title: BOHIN France Display Blossom Scissors-Floral Patterns, for Embroidery and Crafting Projects, Steel, Pink, 9cm
features: Floral Design: Features vibrant floral patterns on the handles, part of the colourful Blossom collection
High-Quality Steel: Crafted for durability and reliable performance during regular crafting use
Precision Cutting: Small 9cm scissors with sharp, finely finished blades for accurate and intricate work
Versatile Application: Ideal for embroidery, needlework, and other detailed craft and sewing projects
Decorative Style: Combines functional cutting tools with a colourful, stylish look to brighten up your workspace
description: Product Description The BOHIN France Display Blossom Embroidery Scissor bring precision and beauty to your sewing kit. With sharp, finely crafted blades and a 9cm length, these scissors offer impeccable accuracy for delicate embroidery work. Featuring vibrant floral patterns on the handles, they are both functional and stylish. Made from high-quality Steel, they’re available in four colours to suit your personal style. Supplied individually or in a convenient counter display with 12 scissors in assorted colours. Safety Warning Keep the pins pointed away from your face and body to avoid accidental injury.
